title: Table Type

originalLanguage.title: Original Language
originalLanguage.description: Original language of the ABAP object

rowType.title: Row Type
rowType.description: Definition of the table line type

typeKind.title: Type Kind
typeKind.description: How the row type is specified
enumDescriptions: Line type is a named dictionary type (structure, table type, data element, etc.)
Line type is a reference to a named dictionary type
Line type is a reference to a class or interface type
Line type is a ranges table based on a data element
Line type is a ranges table based on a predefined ABAP type
Line type is a predefined ABAP built-in type
Line type is a reference to a predefined ABAP built-in type

typeName.title: Type Name
typeName.description: Name of the referenced dictionary type, class, interface, or data element. Relevant when typeKind is dictionaryType, refToDictionaryType, refToClassOrInterfaceType, or rangeTypeOnDataelement.

builtInType.title: Built-In Type
builtInType.description: Details of the built-in ABAP type used as row type. Relevant when typeKind is predefinedAbapType or refToPredefinedAbapType.

dataType.title: Data Type
dataType.description: ABAP built-in data type name (e.g. CHAR, INT4, STRING)

length.title: Length
length.description: Length of the built-in type (relevant for length-variable types such as CHAR, NUMC)

decimals.title: Decimals
decimals.description: Number of decimal places (relevant for DEC, CURR, QUAN)

rangeType.title: Range Type
rangeType.description: Name of the predefined ABAP type for the RANGES row. Relevant when typeKind is rangeTypeOnPredefinedType.

initAndAccess.title: Initialization and Access
initAndAccess.description: Access type and initial fill size

accessType.title: Access Type
enumDescriptions: Standard table (access by index or key)
Sorted table (access by key with binary search)
Hashed table (access by unique hash key only)
Any index table type (standard or sorted, determined at usage)
Access type not specified (fully generic table type)

initialRowCount.title: Initial Row Count
initialRowCount.description: Expected initial number of rows; used for memory pre-allocation

definition.title: Key Definition
definition.description: How the primary key fields are determined
enumDescriptions: Key consists of all non-reference fields of the row type (classic default)
Key fields are listed explicitly in key components
Empty primary key; used for standard tables without explicit key definition

kind.title: Key Uniqueness
kind.description: Whether the primary key is unique or non-unique
enumDescriptions: Duplicate key values are not allowed
Duplicate key values are allowed
Uniqueness not specified

alias.title: Alias
alias.description: Optional alias name for the primary key; only relevant for sorted or hashed tables

components.title: Key Components
components.description: Explicitly named key fields; relevant when definition is keyComponents

items.title: Key Component
items.description: A single explicitly named key field

name.title: Name
name.description: Field name of the key component

secKeysAllowed.title: Further Secondary Keys
secKeysAllowed.description: Whether additional secondary keys beyond those listed may be defined at usage
enumDescriptions: No further secondary keys may be defined at usage
Further secondary keys may be defined at usage

items.title: Secondary Key
items.description: Definition of a single secondary table key

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: Name of the secondary key (up to 30 characters)

description.title: Description
description.description: Short description of the secondary key

access.title: Access Type
access.description: Access type of the secondary key
enumDescriptions: Secondary key is a unique hashed key
Secondary key is a unique sorted key
Secondary key is a non-unique sorted key

definition.title: Key Definition
definition.description: How the secondary key fields are determined
enumDescriptions: All fields of the row type are secondary key fields
Key fields are listed explicitly in key components

components.title: Key Components
components.description: Explicitly named key fields; relevant when definition is keyComponents
